title: White Leaves/Grass in Snow Biomes – Winter Foliage
description: White Leaves/Grass in Snow texture pack changes the colors of leaves and plants in snow biomes to shades of white.
body:
White Leaves/Grass in Snow texture pack changes the colors of leaves and plants in snow biomes to shades of white.

**Requires Optifine to work.**

Changed textures:
* spruce leaves
* grass
* grass block
* fern
* large fern
* sweet berry
* dandelion
* poppy
